name: The Fast and the Furious
description: Dom, Brian, and the cars of the long-running action franchise

questions.q: Which actor plays Dominic Toretto, the bald, muscle-car-loving leader of the crew?

source.notes: Diesel has played Dom in every main entry since 2001.

questions.q: Which actor played FBI agent turned family man Brian O'Conner?

source.notes: Walker starred in seven films before his 2013 death.

questions.q: Who plays Mia Toretto, Dom's sister and Brian's love interest?

source.notes: Brewster has been in seven of the main Fast movies.

questions.q: In which Florida city does '2 Fast 2 Furious' (2003) take place?

source.notes: Directed by John Singleton; introduced Tyrese as Roman Pearce.

questions.q: In what year was the original 'The Fast and the Furious' released in theatres?

source.notes: Released June 22, 2001; directed by Rob Cohen.

questions.q: Who plays the towering federal agent Luke Hobbs, introduced in the fifth film?

source.notes: First appeared in 'Fast Five' (2011).

questions.q: Who plays the wise-cracking Roman Pearce, introduced in '2 Fast 2 Furious'?

source.notes: Gibson also plays Roman in subsequent mainline films.

questions.q: Vin Diesel skipped '2 Fast 2 Furious' to star in which 2002 Rob Cohen action film?

source.notes: Diesel played extreme-sports-athlete-turned-spy Xander Cage.

questions.q: Which director helmed four of the Fast & Furious films and revived the franchise with 'Fast Five'?

source.notes: Directed Tokyo Drift (3), Fast & Furious (4), Fast Five (5), Fast & Furious 6, and F9.

questions.q: In the original 2001 film, what law-enforcement agency does Brian O'Conner actually work for?

source.notes: He's an LAPD officer working undercover for the FBI in the original.

questions.q: Which Israeli actress plays the weapons expert Gisele Yashar, joining the crew in 'Fast & Furious' (2009)?

source.notes: Gadot went on to play Wonder Woman for DC.

questions.q: The character Han Lue, played by Sung Kang, memorably dies in a crash in which city?

source.notes: Shown in 'Tokyo Drift' (2006); chronologically takes place after Fast & Furious 6.

questions.q: In 'Fast & Furious 6', Letty Ortiz returns to Dom's crew but is suffering from what condition?

source.notes: Played by Michelle Rodriguez; presumed dead since Fast 4.

questions.q: Vin Diesel's Dom Toretto is famous for repeatedly invoking what central value of the franchise?

source.notes: Has become a meme for how often the word 'family' appears across the films.

questions.q: Ludacris plays which tech and car expert in the Fast franchise?

source.notes: Introduced in '2 Fast 2 Furious'; returns in later films as hacker and mechanic.

questions.q: The tragic real-life death of star Paul Walker in 2013 forced producers to complete which movie using body doubles and CGI?

source.notes: Released 2015; Walker's brothers Caleb and Cody stood in.

questions.q: The Wiz Khalifa song 'See You Again', played at the end of 'Furious 7', was dedicated to which actor?

source.notes: Featured Charlie Puth; won Best Original Song at the Teen Choice Awards.

questions.q: In 'Fast Five' the crew pulls a massive heist in which country's capital city?

source.notes: Crew steals $100 million from drug lord Hernan Reyes.

questions.q: Who is the protagonist of 'The Fast and the Furious: Tokyo Drift' (2006)?

source.notes: Played by Lucas Black; transferred to Tokyo to live with his father.

questions.q: Which English actor plays franchise villain Deckard Shaw, first introduced in 'Furious 7'?

source.notes: Statham got a Hobbs team-up spin-off film in 2019.

questions.q: In 'Fast & Furious 6', Dom's crew faces off with Owen Shaw's team in a car chase through which European city?

source.notes: Film features chases through Piccadilly Circus and other central London locations.

questions.q: Which Oscar-winning actress joined the Fast franchise as the cyberterrorist villain Cipher in 'The Fate of the Furious'?

source.notes: Theron's Cipher became the franchise's overarching villain through F9.
